published_prior_art.cite: GabrielSachsSjolander2023: JASA decomposition-bounds paper verifies nonsharp naive combination warning, but not this proxy-null PNDE/TNIE mechanism; https://ideas.repec.org/a/taf/jnlasa/v118y2023i544p2446-2453.html

DukesShpitserTchetgen2023 gives proximal mediation point identification; ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023 covers nonunique bridges for counterfactual means; GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 gives proxy partial ID including hidden-mediator NDE/NIE bounds, but none gives the shared-null sharp PNDE/TNIE line segment; https://biblio.ugent.be/publication/01HRSH6RQ7T6SE01X7R20RY0G8, https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.10134, https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.04374

ImaiKeeleYamamoto2010: classical mediation decomposition and sensitivity framework; proxy-null hyperplane check is a routine compatibility translation rather than a standalone new kernel; https://zh.mindat.org/reference.php?id=11350105

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The setup says the mediator-outcome confounder U may be affected by A, but the latent response-type polytope uses a single unindexed U and unindexed proxy response types; either index U/proxies by treatment/mediator histories or state U is pre-treatment for the bridge model.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Sharpen the GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 comparison by explicitly distinguishing their hidden-mediator NDE/NIE proxy bounds from this proposal's observed mediator plus hidden mediator-outcome confounder shared-null geometry.
Replace Conjecture 2 with a derived sanity proposition, or restate Assumption total-effect bridge compatibility so the beta_D + beta_I = 0 conclusion is not already built into the hypothesis.
Add a two-by-two toy latent table showing endpoint attainability or failure; this would make the field-tier novelty less dependent on prose about finite LP projection.

recommended_next_step: Patch the treatment-indexing of the latent polytope and sharpen the Ghassami comparison before sending the proposal forward.
